// 01 — Clans

Our Clans

Team Winter operates a multi-clan ecosystem for players at every stage — from casual warriors to elite attackers chasing Champion League CWL. One culture, many homes.

Multi-TH Roster
Clans for every Town Hall level
War Structure
Organized rosters & attack plans
Internal Movement
Promotion based on performance
Three-Star Culture
Coaching & accountability
View All Clans
// 02 — Clan War Leagues

CWL

CWL is where Team Winter shines. Coordinated rosters, optimized medal output, and strategic placements across multiple clans every single season.

Multi-Clan CWL
Coordinated across all divisions
Medal Optimization
Max rewards for every member
War Generals
Dedicated strategists per clan
Performance Tracking
Historical data & analytics
CWL Records
// 03 — TW Architects

Team Winter Architects

TWA is our professional base-building arm. Anti-three-star war bases, Legend League layouts, CWL-ready designs — built with precision and updated every meta shift.

Custom Bases
Built for every TH level
Subscriptions
Regular base drops on schedule
Anti-Meta
Updated with every balance patch
Priority Access
Members get early drops
Explore TWA
